## Summary

What changed?

## Resource Review

- [ ] New links are HTTPS when available.
- [ ] New resources include a short description.
- [ ] Descriptions are human-written, specific, and not marketing copy or
      unedited AI text.
- [ ] Cost labels are accurate.
- [ ] AI/cloud/API resources mention possible costs.
- [ ] Courses, tutorials, videos, playlists, tools, communities, and curricula are free or
      genuinely free to audit.
- [ ] Paid resources are books, not promotional course submissions.
- [ ] YouTube resources are educational on their own, not mainly funnels into
      paid products.
- [ ] I have disclosed any financial, employment, affiliate, or marketing
      relationship with added resources.
- [ ] Links are not affiliate, referral, coupon, or campaign links.
- [ ] Table-of-contents anchors still work.
- [ ] `resources.yml` is updated for high-priority starter resources.
- [ ] The change keeps the guide curated rather than exhaustive.

## Why This Helps Learners

Explain who benefits and why this resource or edit belongs here.
